ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member's role */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the member's role and term */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the member's term started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the member's term ends */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "web_site" TEXT /* Web site URL for the member */,
  "appointed_by" TEXT /* The authority that appointed the member (e.g., Mayor/Council Confirms) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the member */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the member's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Resident Member, Common Council Member) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "committee_eligible" INTEGER /* Whether the role is eligible for committee membership */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the role's term in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "required_members" INTEGER /* Number of members required for the committee */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee's chairperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_members" (
  "cm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee membership */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the committee */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the member's membership in the committee ends */,
  "committee_role" TEXT /* Role of the member within the committee (e.g., Chairperson, Member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member being appointed */,
  "appointed_by" TEXT /* The authority that appointed the member (e.g., Mayor/Council Confirms) */,
  "confirmation_date" TEXT /* Date the appointment was confirmed */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., New, Reappointment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacancies" (
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacancy */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee with the vacancy */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role for the vacancy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the vacancy starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the vacancy ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vacancy (e.g., Open, Filled) */,
  "vacancy_type" TEXT /* Type of vacancy (e.g., New, Reopening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacancies_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacancies_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Time of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes of the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_meetings_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_attendance" (
  "ma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the member attended the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendance_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendance_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES committee_meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Meeting, Vacancy) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Committee roster, Vacancy list) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
